ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team the player belongs to */,
  "inactive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is inactive */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position the player plays */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college the player attended */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* The number of years of professional experience */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* The player's current salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "winning_team" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the winning team */,
  "losing_team" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the losing team */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "trb_pct" REAL /* Total rebounds percentage */,
  "blk_pct" REAL /* Block percentage */,
  "threep_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "ast_pct" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "usg_pct" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts */,
  "threepa" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for team statistics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "threep_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts */,
  "threepa" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts */,
  "threepa" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "efg_pct" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "drtg" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "ortg" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "ts_pct" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game */,
  "vorp" REAL /* Value over replacement player */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares */,
  "win_shares_48" REAL /* Win shares per 48 minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "starter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was a starter */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "substitution_order" INTEGER /* Order of substitution (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_mates" (
  "mate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teammate entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "teammate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teammate */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made to the teammate */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls made to the teammate */,
  "plus_minus_together" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating while playing together */,
  "minutes_together" INTEGER /* Minutes played together */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_mates_teammate_id FOREIGN KEY ("teammate_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_mates_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team the coach manages */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* List of previous teams coached */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the coach's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the coach's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the fan */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team the fan supports */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fan */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the fan became a member */,
  "favorite_player" TEXT /* Favorite player of the fan */,
  "favorite_position" TEXT /* Favorite position of the fan */,
  "fan_level" TEXT /* Level of fan (e.g., casual, die-hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "rehab_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of rehabilitation */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* End date of rehabilitation */,
  "rehab_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current return status (e.g., probable, questionable, out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
